title: Deliciously Decadent Spanish Shrimp Gambas Al Ajillo
description: A yeasty, shattering, lazy-sunday Spanish dish featuring melted butter and shrimp, cooked to perfection in a tandoor, with anti-inflammatory friendly ingredients.
instructions: Preheat the tandoor to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the yeast, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the shrimp to the bowl and toss to coat with the yeast mixture.
In a small saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the garlic to the saucepan and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the lemon juice to the saucepan and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the shrimp to the saucepan and cook for 2-3 minutes, until pink and cooked through.
Stir in the parsley and cook for an additional 30 seconds.
Serve the shrimp hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
